title: Reader Outcomes, Publisher Respect, and Product Contract
description: A team proposes a blog aggregator from a feature list but has not defined reader decisions, publisher obligations, freshness, content harm, accessibility, privacy, or mastery evidence. Learners cumulatively produce inclusive feed-reader product contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define reader population, decision, task journey, accepted delay, failure harm, and observable learning or research value.
Specify respectful identification, fetch cadence, caching, correction, deletion, source pause, and incident contact behavior.
Separate source discovery, ingestion, storage, scheduling, API, reader state, and presentation with explicit accepted unknowns.
